summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Métro-Taxi i18n (internationalization) and email verification features. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend i18n testing verified language switching, POPULAIRE badge translation, subscription-based concept visibility, and currency-specific pricing (£ for UK, € for France/Spain/Portugal).
passed_tests: Backend: User registration returns verification URL and token
Backend: Duplicate email registration rejected (400)
Backend: Driver registration returns verification URL and token
Backend: Admin login with correct credentials
Backend: Admin login with wrong password rejected (401)
Backend: Admin stats endpoint returns user/driver/subscription counts
Backend: Admin drivers list endpoint
Backend: Admin users list endpoint
Backend: Admin subscriptions endpoint
Backend: Admin virtual cards endpoint
Backend: Subscription plans endpoint returns 24h/1week/1month plans
Frontend: Landing page loads with MÉTRO-TAXI branding
Frontend: Language selector opens and shows 13 languages
Frontend: French - 'PAR ABONNEMENT' subtitle visible
Frontend: French - 'POPULAIRE' badge on weekly plan
Frontend: French - Euro pricing (6,99 €, 16,99 €, 53,99 €)
Frontend: English UK - 'SUBSCRIPTION-BASED' subtitle visible
Frontend: English UK - 'POPULAR' badge on weekly plan
Frontend: English UK - Pound pricing (£5.99, £14.99, £45.99)
Frontend: Spanish - 'POR SUSCRIPCIÓN' subtitle visible
Frontend: Spanish - 'POPULAR' badge on weekly plan
Frontend: Spanish - Euro pricing aligned with France (6,99 €, 16,99 €, 53,99 €)
Frontend: Portuguese - 'POR ASSINATURA' subtitle visible
Frontend: Portuguese - 'POPULAR' badge on weekly plan
Frontend: Portuguese - Euro pricing aligned with France (6,99 €, 16,99 €, 53,99 €)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard - French tabs (Chauffeurs, Usagers, Abonnements, Cartes Virtuelles)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard - French labels (Validé, En attente, Activer, Désactiver)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard - French stats (Usagers inscrits, Abonnements actifs, Trajets en cours)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All i18n features tested and working. Language switching functional for all 13 languages. POPULAIRE badge correctly translates per language. Pricing shows £ for en-GB and € for other European languages. Admin Dashboard fully translated. Email verification via Resend is working (test mode - emails only sent to verified address judeesouleymane24@gmail.com).

email_verification_status.mode: Test mode - emails only to verified address (judeesouleymane24@gmail.com)
email_verification_status.email_templates: Available in fr, en, es, de, pt
